entries.label: Is an Industrial Stormwater Treatment System Present?
Does the facility qualify for a SWPPP?
Is an Annual Comprehensive SWPPP Inspection Conducted?
Is the SWPPP available for public and agency review upon request?
Has the annual SWPPP training been conducted?
Does SWPPP need to be updated?
SWPPP Recommendation
entries.default: Apex recommends that a SWPPP be prepared for the facility.

entries.label: Does the facility qualify for a SPCC Plan?
Has the annual SPCC training been conducted?
Does SPCC need to be updated?
SPCC Recommendation
entries.default: Apex recommends that a SPCC be prepared for the facility.

entries.label: Recommendation
entries.default: Apex recommends that Quarterly Inspections be completed per Permit Requirements.

entries.label: Recommendation
entries.default: Some states (e.g. California) require monthly Inspections to be completed per Permit Requirements.

entries.label: Is the site currently covered by a NPDES permit?
Most current NPDES permit included in SPCC plan?
Are Hazardous Waste AST Assessment required per 22 CCR 66265.192? (CA only).
Any emergency response/spill response kits available?
